content:
And then the questions if you do want to see them, like, that's really cool too.

But also I need feedback, too, because, right, if you're, like, you know, the concept of feeling good first and then, like, that doesn't make sense, Matty.

I don't know how to feel good based on, like, what's broken down, then we can always, like , reshuffle and reorganize a bit too, so that it's like, right, maybe I start with this.

Yeah, I don't know.

So do like the feedback, but do also want, like, all of this integrated in, right?

Because it it is, it makes so much sense, and it's like, just simplify it, make it, right, take the emotion out of it for a second, logically break it down, and then move forward with grace and and love for yourself because you're just trying to, right in his instance, he was just trying, that little kid inside of him was just trying to find his people, his family.

And so he did that where it was easy, and thus the reward was not as strong.

And so you pick your heart with the best reward, in my opinion.
